code.description:
Simplified ad code for ad slots on the page.
Eg. '6581/web/us/*/news_info/country_home'

status.description:
One of 'active', 'missing', or 'restricted' indicating a user's ID status
Default missing.

cookie3p.description:
One of 'active', 'missing', or 'restricted' indicating a user can access 3rd party cookies or not.
Default missing.
